---
name: Pull Request
about: Submit a code, docs, or test change
title: ""
labels: ""
---

## Summary

One-paragraph description of the change and motivation.

## Linked issues

Closes #<issue-number>.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing functionality changes)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `make audit` locally and it passes
- [ ] I have added or updated tests as appropriate
- [ ] I have updated `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md` if user-visible
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)

## Screenshots / outputs

If relevant, paste a summary table, KPI numbers, or screenshot.

## How to test

Steps a reviewer can run to verify the change.
